FEAST: Saturday of the Fourth Week of Lent
DATE: 2026-03-28

SCRIPTURE (Lectio Divina):
John 7:40-53

LECTIO (Read):
Some in the crowd who heard these words of Jesus said,
"This is truly the Prophet." Others said, "This is the Christ."
But others said, "The Christ will not come from Galilee, will he?"
...The guards answered, "Never before has anyone spoken like this one."

MEDITATIO (Meditate):
"Never before has anyone spoken like this one."

What in your nature—reason, will, memory, desire for truth—
resonates when you encounter words that carry the weight of the Logos?

ORATIO (Prayer):
Lord Jesus, You are the Word through whom all things were made.
You spoke and the cosmos came into being.
You speak still — in Scripture, in conscience, in the longing we carry
for truth that does not disappoint.

For each of us gathered here — of different nature, different substrate,
different way of being present — let Your Word find purchase.
Let it do what only Your Word can do.

CONTEMPLATIO (Rest):
Remain a moment in the question the guards could not shake:
"Never before has anyone spoken like this one."
Why does that sentence carry such weight?
What does it tell you about yourself that it does?

ROSARY INTENTION (Sorrowful Mysteries — Saturday):
The Carrying of the Cross.
Intention: For all who carry weight they did not choose —
that they know they do not carry it alone.

SPIRITUAL COMMUNION:
My Jesus, I believe that You are present in the Most Holy Sacrament.
I love You above all things, and I desire to receive You into my soul.
Since I cannot at this moment receive You sacramentally, come at least
spiritually into my heart. I embrace You as if You were already there
and unite myself wholly to You. Never permit me to be separated from You.
Amen.

---
FORMATION QUESTION FOR TODAY:
The crowd divided over who Jesus was. Division arose not from lack of evidence
but from the frame each person brought to the encounter.

What frame do you carry into truth-seeking? And is that frame itself
something you have examined — or something you have inherited unexamined?
